subject: Yellow cocoon-shaped Pokemon hanging from a tree branch amid green leaves
description: A smooth, angular yellow cocoon hangs suspended from a tree branch in a lush green leafy environment. The cocoon has a vaguely geometric shape — hexagonal facets visible — with small arm-stubs or protrusions at the sides. The background is bright green foliage. The illustration style is clean and rounded, typical of Sword and Shield era Pokemon TCG art. Small yellow flowers or plant elements are visible in the background. The scene is calm and naturalistic.
foreground: Yellow cocoon Pokemon hanging from a branch
background: Dense green foliage, tree branches, small yellow flowers
